phrases.intent_en: Ask what ecosystems are inside the Biodôme
phrases.text_local: Quels types d'écosystèmes est-ce qu'on peut voir à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel teep day-ko-sees-TEM ess-KON puh VWAHR ah lan-tay-RYUR
phrases.cultural_note: The Biodôme recreates four American ecosystems: tropical rainforest, Laurentian maple forest, Gulf of St. Lawrence, and Sub-Antarctic Islands.

responses.english: There are four ecosystems to see.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ah KAH-truh ay-koh-sees-TEM ah VWAHR
responses.french: Il y a quatre écosystèmes à voir.

phrases.text_local: Les pingouins, c'est dans quelle section ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay pan-GWAN say dah kel sek-SYON
phrases.cultural_note: The Sub-Antarctic section houses African penguins and puffins and is a crowd favourite, especially with kids.

responses.english: In the sub-Antarctic zone, at the back.
responses.phonetic: dahn lah ZOHN soob-ahn-tark-TEEK oh FOHN
responses.french: Dans la zone subantarctique, au fond.

phrases.text_local: Je voudrais des billets pour deux adultes et deux enfants.
phrases.pronunciation: zhuh voo-DREH day bee-YEH poor duh zah-DULT ay duh zahn-FAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Biodôme is part of the Espace pour la vie complex along with the Insectarium, Planetarium, and Botanical Garden — combo tickets save money.

responses.english: Two adults, two children? Sixty-eight dollars.
responses.phonetic: duh zah-DULT duh zahn-FAHN swah-SAHNT-WEET doh-LAR
responses.french: Deux adultes, deux enfants ? Soixante-huit dollars.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a feeding time to watch
phrases.text_local: Est-ce qu'il y a des heures de nourrissage à ne pas manquer ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess-KEEL ee ah day zur duh noo-ree-SAHZH ah nuh pah mon-KAY
phrases.cultural_note: Feeding times for the lynx, sea otters, and penguins are scheduled throughout the day and posted at the entrance.

responses.english: You need to check the times at reception.
responses.phonetic: eel foh vay-ree-FYAY lay zoh-RAIR ah lah-KUY
responses.french: Il faut vérifier les horaires à l'accueil.

phrases.text_local: Les toilettes, c'est où s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: lay twah-LET say OO seel voo PLEH
phrases.cultural_note: In Québec, washrooms are also called 'les toilettes' or 'la salle de bain'. Asking for 'les restrooms' will be understood but use the French.

responses.english: At the end of the hallway, on the right.
responses.phonetic: oh FOHN doo koo-LWAHR ah DRWAHT
responses.french: Au fond du couloir, à droite.
